title: alstroemeria × chrysantha
intro: Alstroemeria × chrysantha, also known as the Peruvian lily or Golden Lily, is a hybrid plant species in the genus Alstroemeria. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alstroemeria × chrysantha include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce the risk of heart disease. Alstroemeria × chrysantha is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made from the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots.
